title: Channel Envelope
description: Canonical typed envelope for an inbound or outbound channel message, carrying routing metadata, trust classification, and optional cryptographic binding.

session_id.description: Session context for this message exchange.

message_id.description: External message identifier from the originating channel.

thread_id.description: Thread or conversation identifier, if applicable.

sender_handle.description: Display handle or address of the sender (e.g. email, username).

identity_binding_ref.description: Reference to the identity binding record for the sender.

received_at_unix_ms.description: Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the message was received.

metadata.description: Freeform channel-specific metadata (e.g. Slack event type, MIME headers).

signature_ref.description: Reference to the cryptographic signature over this envelope.
